violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on prep unit 1. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The sink connection on the prep sink is inserted below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024
The kitchen floor has areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
